display.name: Krash + Illusion - Spiral Movement
display.author: Krash/Illusion
display.blurb: Hypnotic spiraling motion that rotates with each beat.

annotation.technical_notes: Custom waves trace delicate, jittery orbits across a dark void, with their high-frequency displacement modulated by the treble and mid bands of the audio. A subtle per-pixel warp shader combined with frame feedback through sampler_main creates a spiraling, decaying trail of past waveforms. The high decay rate ensures a sparse, clean aesthetic with minimal persistent clutter.
